arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal injury blow for Shakhtar amid Saka and Timber updates
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has provided a fitness update on Bukayo Saka, Jurrien Timber and Martin Odegaard ahead of Arsenal’s Champions League clash with Shakhtar Donetsk. The Dutch international has been absent since Arsenal’s last Champions League clash with PSG prior to the international break, and has not trained as a result of a muscular problem.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's new damning title chances after Bournemouth defeat as supercomputer tips Liverpool to challenge Man City
arts.sum: Arsenal's chances of winning the Premier League have been recalculated after a shock weekend defeat against Bournemouth handed Man City and Liverpool the advantage.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville points finger at Mikel Arteta over Arsenal 'excuse' ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will have to cope without William Saliba against Liverpool next week, but he's been told by Gary Neville that he won't be able to use that as an excuse if Arsenal come up short

arts.ttl: Gary Neville pinpoints two things Arsenal must do to win the Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal have dropped points on three occasions so far this season against Brighton and Hove Albion, Manchester City and now Bournemouth. Former Manchester United captain Gary Neville believes Arsenal need to show more resilience when down to ten men if they wish to win the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Referee chiefs respond to Arsenal fans' Howard Webb conspiracy theory after William Saliba's red card left supporters raging - as Jamie Carragher deletes tweet asking all-important question
arts.sum: Saliba had been initially booked for the foul but the decision was overturned after referee Rob Jones was recommended to do an on field review, with Webb seen using his phone and an earpiece.

arts.ttl: How many games is William Saliba suspended for?
arts.sum: William Saliba was sent off during Arsenal’s 2-0 defeat at Bournemouth in the Premier League at the weekend, with the Frenchman’s first-half red card contributing to a first loss of the season for the Gunners. Saliba was shown a straight red card in the 30th minute for the denial of a goal-scoring opportunity, when he […] The post How many games is William Saliba suspended for? first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta Drops Arsenal Injury Update on Bukayo Saka and Martin Odegaard
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has provided an injury update on Bukayo Saka and Martin Odegaard at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal lead race for transfer of 74 G/A superstar who could cost €100m
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly leading the race for the potential transfer of Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres as he continues to produce superb numbers for club and country. The Sweden international was playing in the Championship with Coventry City not that long ago, having previously struggled to establish himself in a spell at Brighton, but he’s […] The post Arsenal lead race for transfer of 74 G/A superstar who could cost €100m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta failing to solve Arsenal’s referee problem as suspensions continue to flow
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League title bid took a hit on Saturday as they were beaten 2-0 by Bournemouth, with William Saliba becoming the third Gunners star to be sent off this season

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Tottenham & Arsenal want Gittens, Real Madrid to re-sign Paz?
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. And Transfermarkt will be going LIVE on YouTube every Monday...
